title: A Study About How Well TAK-279 Works and Its Safety in Participants With Moderate-to-severe Plaque Psoriasis During 52 Weeks of Treatment

eligibility.text: Plaque psoriasis for at least 6 months
eligibility.justification: This criterion ensures a sufficient duration of disease to detect treatment effects.
The severity level is crucial for detecting treatment differences in this condition.

eligibility.text: Candidate for phototherapy or systemic therapy
eligibility.justification: This criterion helps define the patient population who can benefit from these treatments, ensuring feasibility of study participation.
This criterion ensures a diverse group for comparison and analysis to maximize statistical power.
This criterion protects patients from potential complications related to infections.

eligibility.text: Prior exposure to TAK-279 or active comparator
eligibility.justification: This criterion prevents bias by excluding individuals who have already received the treatment being compared.

eligibility.text: Other protocol defined inclusion/exclusion criteria apply.
eligibility.justification: This is a general category that may encompass various operational or data quality considerations.
